prompt.name: Coherence Coach Track — S14.V 验证与穷举重测
prompt.sub_stage_name: 验证 — 单元测试 + 全量回归 + 穷举 256 组合重测 + comparison analysis
prompt.role: 你是 Coherence Phase 14 验证者。 你的任务是：确认 S14.1-S14.4 全部正确实现，运行全量回归和穷举重测， 量化验证诊断-适应闭环闭合的效果。
prompt.context:
=== 激活清单 === S14.1 ✅ Composer prompt 注入 difficulty 参数 S14.2 ✅ Agent 根据 BKT mastery 决策难度 S14.3 ✅ Context window → 上下文引用提升 Personalization S14.4 ✅ 话题追踪 + 连贯对话流
=== 基线（Phase 13 穷举测试结果） === LLM OFF avg: 14.5/24 LLM ON avg: 16.8/24 Overall avg: 15.6/24 Personalization: 1.81/4 256/256 PASS, 0 FAILED 1251 PASS / 10 expected failures
=== 预期变化 === 诊断-适应闭环闭合后： - Personalization 从 1.81/4 提升到 2.8+/4（上下文引用注入） - LLM OFF avg 从 14.5/24 提升到 15.5+/24（难度分级模板） - LLM ON avg 从 16.8/24 提升到 17.5+/24（难度自适应 + context） - 最低组合从 12.0/24 提升到 13.0+/24（难度自适应减少极端低分）

step.name: 1. 确认所有变更文件存在
2. 单元测试 — S14.1 Composer difficulty 注入
step.expected: 5+ tests pass: difficulty 默认值、三级注入、LLM prompt 包含难度指令、FallbackEngine 模板分级、降级行为

step.name: 3. 单元测试 — S14.2 Agent 难度决策
step.expected: 5+ tests pass: mastery→difficulty 映射、无数据降级、disabled 降级、参数传递

step.name: 4. 单元测试 — S14.3 上下文引用
step.expected: 4+ tests pass: context_window 维护、prompt 注入、Fallback 占位符填充

step.name: 5. 单元测试 — S14.4 话题追踪
step.expected: 4+ tests pass: current_topic 追踪、过渡语生成、低掌握技能选择

step.name: 7. 集成测试 — 难度自适应全链路
step.command:
python -c " import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.') from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent
agent = CoachAgent(...)
# 设置低掌握度 agent._diagnostic_engine._store.update('python_variable', False) agent._diagnostic_engine._store.update('python_variable', False)
# 验证难度决策 diff = agent._resolve_difficulty('python_variable') print(f'Low mastery → difficulty: {diff}') assert diff == 'easy', f'Expected easy, got {diff}'
# 设置高掌握度 agent._diagnostic_engine._store.update('python_list', True) agent._diagnostic_engine._store.update('python_list', True) agent._diagnostic_engine._store.update('python_list', True)
diff = agent._resolve_difficulty('python_list') print(f'High mastery → difficulty: {diff}') assert diff == 'hard', f'Expected hard, got {diff}'
print('Difficulty adaptation: OK') "
step.expected: 低掌握→easy，高掌握→hard，全链路通

step.name: 8. 集成测试 — 上下文引用
step.command:
python -c " import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.') from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent
agent = CoachAgent(...)
# 模拟多轮对话 r1 = agent.act('我试了 age = 18') r2 = agent.act('好像理解了')
# 验证 context_window print(f'Context window: {agent._context_window}') assert len(agent._context_window) > 0, 'Context window empty'
# 验证回复中包含引用 stmt = r2.get('payload', {}).get('statement', '') has_ref = any(w in stmt[:200] for w in ['你说的', '你刚才', 'age = 18']) print(f'Has reference: {has_ref}') print(f'Statement preview: {stmt[:100]}') "
step.expected: context_window 非空，回复引用前轮用户发言

step.name: 9. 穷举重测 — 全量 256 组合
step.note: 仅当步骤 1-8 全部通过后执行
step.command: export DEEPSEEK_API_KEY="YOUR_DEEPSEEK_API_KEY" export PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 cd /d/Claudedaoy/coherence && \ rm -f reports/exhaustive_all_configs_progress.json && \ python tests/test_exhaustive_all_configs.py

metric.name: context_window 引用
metric.expected: 回复中包含对前轮用户发言的引用

pass_criteria.criterion: 回复中包含上下文引用
difficulty 参数从 Agent 传递到 LLM prompt

deliverables.item: Phase 14 comparison table: | 指标 | Phase 13 | Phase 14 | Δ | | Personalization | 1.81 | target 2.8+ | +1.0 | | LLM OFF | 14.5 | target 15.5+ | +1.0 | | LLM ON | 16.8 | target 17.5+ | +0.7 |
